---
title: "Weekly Journal Entry (MC 501)"
subtitle: "Week"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
params:
  week: 1
  title: "Untitled"
  chapters: "1"
  approach: "connector"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
---

## Journal Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Week** | `r params$week` |
| **Chapter(s) Read** | `r params$chapters` |
| **Graduate Extension** | [Name the assigned reading] |
| **Approach** | `r tools::toTitleCase(params$approach)` |

---

## Instructions (MC 501)

Write 450-500 words reflecting on this week's material. Your entry must engage with BOTH the chapter content AND the graduate extension reading.

Entries that address only the chapter content will receive a maximum of 7/10 points.

Choose one approach:

- **The Connector**: Link the chapter and graduate reading to each other, your project, or broader debates
- **The Troubleshooter**: Document a challenge and how you resolved it, referencing both chapter and extension
- **The Critic**: Critically examine a claim from the chapter or graduate reading

Delete the two approaches you are NOT using.

---

## My Reflection

[Write 450-500 words here. Reference the graduate extension reading by name.]

---

*Rendered on `r Sys.time()` | MC-501 Advanced Research Methods | coursepackR*
